title: Neoprene Wristlet Makeup Bag with Contrast Zipper | Custom Travel Cosmetic Pouch
seoTitle: Neoprene Wristlet Makeup Bag | Custom Cosmetic Pouch Manufacturer OEM
description:
Designed for customers who value both convenience and modern aesthetics, this neoprene wristlet makeup bag combines lightweight construction with practical storage. The vibrant contrast zipper and matching wrist strap create a fashionable look while making the pouch easy to carry on its own or inside a larger travel bag.

Made from premium neoprene, the bag offers excellent flexibility, cushioning, and splash resistance to help protect cosmetics, skincare products, toiletries, and personal accessories. The structured base allows it to stand upright, making packing and accessing your essentials more convenient.

Its streamlined silhouette is suitable for everyday use, business trips, weekend travel, beach holidays, and gym visits. The wrist strap provides comfortable one-handed carrying, making it an excellent choice for users who need quick access to frequently used items.

Guizhou O'lay Technology Co., Ltd offers full OEM and ODM manufacturing services, supporting custom colors, Pantone matching, logo printing, embossed branding, zipper customization, packaging solutions, and private label production for beauty brands, promotional projects, wholesalers, and retailers worldwide.
seoDescription: Custom neoprene wristlet makeup bag manufacturer offering lightweight cosmetic pouches with wrist straps, custom logos, colors, sizes and OEM/ODM services for beauty brands and wholesalers.
